sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
insert into TransX (KeyID, Period, GL, CC,Amt1) (Select KeyID, Period, '6115019',  CC, Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
update TransX set Amt1 = round(-Amt1,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '6210000'
update TransX set PK = '40' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 > 0
update TransX set PK = '50' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 < 0
update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'Co. Car Lease for Bijan Khosrowshahi [Yr]/[Mo]', PC = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
